question:
The other two places where the hazardous material identification number must appear are
1) on the gas tank and on a sticker in the glove compartment.
2) on all bulk packaging and on the cargo tanks.
3) on a temporary license plate holder and on the steering wheel.
4) on the back of the truck and inside the glove compartment.
canonical_answer: on all bulk packaging and on the cargo tanks.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Endorsement Nj
appears_in.answer: on all bulk packaging and on the cargo tanks.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Practice Test Nj
appears_in.answer: on all bulk packaging and on the cargo tanks.

appears_in.title: Hazmat Test Nj
appears_in.answer: on all bulk packaging and on the cargo tanks.

appears_in.title: Nj Hazmat Practice Test
